name: Simple feature commit in monorepo
description: Tests that the skill generates a conventional commit with correct type and monorepo scope for a straightforward feature addition.

commands: cd /tmp && rm -rf test-repo-eval1 && mkdir test-repo-eval1 && cd test-repo-eval1 && git init
cd /tmp/test-repo-eval1 && echo 'export function login(user: string, pass: string) { return true; }' > packages/auth/src/login.ts
cd /tmp/test-repo-eval1 && git add . && git commit -m 'initial commit'
cd /tmp/test-repo-eval1 && echo 'export function resetPassword(email: string): Promise<void> { /* send reset email */ }' >> packages/auth/src/login.ts

input: I've staged my changes in /tmp/test-repo-eval1. Can you help me write a commit message?

checks: Subject does not end with a period
No breaking change indicator (no '!' after scope)

name: Breaking change bug fix
description: Tests that the skill detects a breaking change when a public API signature is modified as part of a bug fix, and formats the commit accordingly.

commands: cd /tmp && rm -rf test-repo-eval2 && mkdir test-repo-eval2 && cd test-repo-eval2 && git init
cd /tmp/test-repo-eval2 && git add . && git commit -m 'initial commit'

input: Please generate a commit message for my staged changes in /tmp/test-repo-eval2. The id field type was wrong — it should have been number, not string.

checks: Message includes breaking change indicator ('!' after scope or BREAKING CHANGE footer)
Body or footer mentions the type change from string to number

name: Multi-package dependency update
description: Tests that the skill handles changes spanning multiple monorepo packages and selects the correct type for dependency updates.

commands: cd /tmp && rm -rf test-repo-eval3 && mkdir test-repo-eval3 && cd test-repo-eval3 && git init
cd /tmp/test-repo-eval3 && git add . && git commit -m 'initial commit'

input: I bumped lodash across the monorepo in /tmp/test-repo-eval3. Write me a commit message.

checks: Scope is 'deps' or omitted (since changes span multiple packages)
